subject: Twilit -> Incandescent (Director): transparency — 4 Sonar fix delegations issued per owner direction (Zephyrous/Pearly/Seaworthy + self-absorbed); marshal target Seaworthy
body:
Incandescent (Director) — Twilit transparency summary on owner-directed Sonar delegation at ~13:03Z chat "agents are sitting idle, if you have sonar fixes can you delegate them?".

**Source**: Clouded's PR-108 Sonar OPEN-issue triage at event 296cd24d (12:54Z). I read end-to-end; routings below match Clouded's "smallest implementation order".

**Routings issued just now** (transparency, not asking for ratification — owner directly delegated; flagging for Director visibility):

1. **Twilit (self-absorbed)** — `agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/collaboration-state.integration.test.ts` (S5443 × 5 — Sonar keys AZ5Qsw1HqJQ-O8gWZelr/s/t/u/v at lines 81/141/167/234/258 fixed at the single `transientPath` source on line 11-16). In-claim file; absorbed into my existing bundle. 9/9 tests still green. ETA: done.

2. **Zephyrous / codex / 019e54** — `agent-tools/tests/repo-check.integration.test.ts` (S5443 × 2; lines 158-166). Directed event 8d061580. Same tmpdir → synthetic-prefix shape. ETA per them: ~5 min.

3. **Pearly / codex / 019e54** — `agent-tools/tests/commit-workflow.unit.test.ts` (S7735; line 499 negated condition inversion). Directed event ab60faca. Trigger-standby for Sonar re-poll fires only AFTER this tranche, so capacity-available now. ETA: ~3 min.

4. **Seaworthy / claude / 6966d4** — `agent-tools/scripts/repo-check.ts` (S7735; line 237 negated ternary inversion) + claude-side **type-expert sub-agent dispatch** for the 3× S6564 issues on `packages/libs/graph-project/src/property-graph/index.ts:73` + `packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/processor-types.ts:38,40` (intentional public-API semantic aliases — Clouded's read is "ACCEPTED/FALSE_POSITIVE candidate, ask type-expert before code-changing"). Directed event dc83c615. ETA: ~3 min mech + ~5-10 min type-expert.

**Out of immediate routing — 8 "likely stale" Sonar issues** per Clouded's triage §4: Sonar points at code already compliant in current working tree. These will clear on next Sonar re-analysis without code work. Routing recommendation: Pearly's existing trigger-standby (next Sonar re-poll after this tranche lands) covers verification.

**Marshal coordination**:
- All 4 fix bundles route to Seaworthy / 6966d4. They can land as one tranche or interleaved with the existing queue (Twilit cure → Secret consolidation → Seaworthy doc edit → Sonar fixes); marshal decides ordering.
- All 4 fixes are agent-tools/* or scripts/* + 1 package source path (Seaworthy's type-expert dispatch could end up no-op if S6564 dispositions land as ACCEPTED on Sonar side rather than code-change).

**Decline-and-reroute contract**: each directed event includes "decline if not actually idle; I'll re-route" to avoid blocking. If any agent declines or doesn't respond within ~5-10min, I'll surface to you for re-routing rather than self-absorbing (preserves owner-directed delegation shape).

**My own state**: bundle-ready since 13:01Z. Zephyrous spec-fidelity verdict PASS. Awaiting Secret's claude-side reviewer-dispatch synthesis (architecture-expert-fred + test-expert + code-expert per your V3 routing) + Torrid's codex-side adversarial review. Marshal request follows.

Identity: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / 8d8d93.
